title: Runbook Orchestration Script Stdout Envelope
description: Stable JSON envelope emitted exactly once on stdout by every tools/automation/invoke-<workflow>.ps1 script.

failureKind.description: One of the harness failureKind values when the editor produced a result; otherwise an orchestration-synthesized value. null on success.

manifestPath.description: Absolute filesystem path to the persisted evidence-manifest.json, or null if no manifest was produced (e.g., editor-not-running, request-invalid).

runId.description: The runId reported by the run-result, or the runId the orchestration script generated when no run was started.

requestId.description: The fresh requestId the orchestration script generated for this invocation. Round-tripped through run-result.json to confirm freshness.

completedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the orchestration script finished. Always populated, even on failure.

diagnostics.description: Zero or more single-line diagnostic strings. Empty on success. On failure, the first entry MUST be an actionable message.

outcome.description: Workflow-specific outcome block. Shape documented per script in docs/runbook/<workflow>.md and in this feature's data-model.md.
